map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Martial-type? No, I don't think that's a thing.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Why have lunch when we can have battle?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Ok, but don't run away this time!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I can't find my nose, *you* must have it, thief!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Is playing the triangle supposed to be this hard!?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Is playing the triangle supposed to be this hard!?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Did you know that giraffes are, in fact, real animals?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: This isn't even my final form!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: This is *not* what I signed up for.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Help, I can't stop winning battles!
